specializations: Liposomal delivery systems for cosmetics and nutraceuticals
Nano-encapsulated actives for enhanced skin penetration
product_highlights: Lipo-C™ — liposomal vitamin C for superior skin absorption
Nano-Mulsion™ — nanoemulsion delivery platform for hydrophobic actives
Particle sizes of 50–150 nm for optimal dermal penetration
notes: Nanosphere Health Sciences is a specialized liposomal delivery technology company offering a range of pre-made liposomal ingredient systems and custom liposome manufacturing services for the cosmetic and nutraceutical industries. Their Nano-Mulsion™ and liposomal vitamin C platforms provide formulators with ready-to-use, highly bioavailable delivery systems that significantly outperform conventional ingredient incorporation. Nanosphere is an important reference supplier for SKIN-TWIN's liposome-based active delivery recommendations.
